sqlMap.select:
/*ReportWrite002.selectReport002SheetList*/ SELECT T.* , NVL(T.REPORT_NAMES, '') || DECODE(NVL(T.SHEET_NAMES, ''), '', '', DECODE(NVL(T.REPORT_NAMES, ''), '', NVL(T.SHEET_NAMES, ''), ', ' || NVL(T.SHEET_NAMES, ''))) AS COL73 , NVL(T.SRCH_VALES010, '') || DECODE(NVL(T.SRCH_VALES020, ''), '', '', DECODE(NVL(T.SRCH_VALES010, ''), '', NVL(T.SRCH_VALES020, ''), ' ' || NVL(T.SRCH_VALES020, ''))) AS COL74 , DECODE(T.E00, 0, 'E00,', '') || DECODE(T.E10, 0, 'E10,', '') || DECODE(T.E11, 1, '', 'E11,') || DECODE(T.E12, 0, 'E12,', '') || CASE WHEN T.RE13 = 0 OR T.SE13 = 0 THEN 'E13,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V110 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND R031 = 'N' THEN 'E20,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V120 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND R032 = 'N' THEN 'E21,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V130 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND R033 = 'N' THEN 'E22,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V110 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND R034 = 'N' THEN 'E23,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V120 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND R034 = 'N' THEN 'E24,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V130 > 0 AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND R034 = 'N' THEN 'E25,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V140 > 0 AND STA3 = 'N' THEN 'E26,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN V150 > 0 AND STA5 = 'N' THEN 'E27,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R031 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND V110 = 0 THEN 'E30,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R032 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND V120 = 0 THEN 'E31,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R033 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '100' AND V130 = 0 THEN 'E32,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R034 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND V110 = 0 THEN 'E33,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R034 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND V120 = 0 THEN 'E34,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN R034 = 'Y'AND FIS_FG_MST_CD = '200' AND V130 = 0 THEN 'E35,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN STA3 = 'Y' AND V140 = 0 THEN 'E36,' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN STA5 = 'Y' AND V150 = 0 THEN 'E37,' ELSE '' END AS COL79 FROM ( SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , C.FIS_FG_CD AS FIS_FG_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , E.FIS_FG_MST_CD AS FIS_FG_MST_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_CD FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DBIZ_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL0 , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL1 , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = C.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_CD = C.FIS_FG_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL2 , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL3 , DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, NULL, '', '00000', '', SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4)) AS COL4 , NVL((SELECT Z.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL5 , NVL((SELECT Z.SYMBOL FROM TB_DGRCOMPOSYMBOL Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = A.COMPO_LEVEL AND SYMBOL_LENGTH > 0), '') || A.COMP_GROUND AS COL6 , NVL((SELECT Z.SECT_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL7 , NVL((SELECT Z.FLD_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL8 , CAST((A.PRE_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL9 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL10, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL10 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL11, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL11 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL12, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL12 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL13, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL13 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL14, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL14 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL15, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL15 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL16, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL16 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL17, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL17 , CAST((A.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL18 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL19, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL19 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL20, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL20 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL21, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL21 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL22, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL22 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL23, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL23 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL24, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL24 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL25, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL25 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL26, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL26 , A.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR AS COL27 , CAST((A.DEMAND_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL28 , CAST((A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL29 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL30, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL30 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL31, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL31 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL32, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL32 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL33, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL33 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL34, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL34 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL35, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL35 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL36, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL36 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL37, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL37 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL38, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL38 , A.COMP_FORMULAR AS COL39 , CAST((A.BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL40 , CAST((A.DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL41 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL42, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL42 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL43, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL43 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL44, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL44 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL45, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL45 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL46, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL46 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL47, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL47 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL48, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL48 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL49, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL49 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL50, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL50 , CAST(((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0) + NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0) + NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0) + NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0) + NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0) + NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL51 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT1, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL52 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT2, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL53 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT3, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL54 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT4, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL55 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT5, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL56 , CAST((NVL(D.TOT_FRSC_AMT6, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL57 , CAST(((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0) + NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0) + NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3, 0) + NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0) + NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0) + NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL58 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT1, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL59 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT2, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL60 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT3, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL61 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT4, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL62 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT5, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL63 , CAST((NVL(D.PRE_INV_FRSC_AMT6, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL64 , CAST(((Z.COL66 + Z.COL67 + Z.COL68 + Z.COL69 + Z.COL70 + Z.COL71)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL65 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL66, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL66 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL67, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL67 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL68, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL68 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL69, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL69 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL70, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL70 , CAST((NVL(Z.COL71, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS COL71 , DECODE(D.REPORT_SORT_SEQ, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(D.REPORT_SORT_SEQ)) AS COL72 , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z2.DETL_CD_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT Z1 , TB_COMMCDDETL Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.DETL_CD = Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z2.CL_CD = 'RP002' AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z2.LINE_UP_ORD ) , '') AS REPORT_NAMES , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z2.DETL_CD_NM SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_SHEET Z1 , TB_COMMCDDETL Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.DETL_CD = Z1.SHEET_DETL_CD AND Z2.CL_CD = 'RT002' AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z2.LINE_UP_ORD ) , '') AS SHEET_NAMES , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z.SRCH_VAL SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT010 Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) , '') AS SRCH_VALES010 , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z.SRCH_VAL SEPARATOR ', ') AS SHEET_NAMES FROM TB_REPORT020 Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) , '') AS SRCH_VALES020 , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COL75 , NVL((SELECT Z2.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_REPORT010 Z1 , TB_COMMCDDETL Z2 WHERE Z2.CL_CD = 'RP003' AND Z2.DETL_CD = Z1.REFLECT_FG AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL76 , NVL((SELECT Z2.DETL_CD_NM FROM TB_REPORT020 Z1 , TB_COMMCDDETL Z2 WHERE Z2.CL_CD = 'RP003' AND Z2.DETL_CD = Z1.REFLECT_FG AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS COL77 , NVL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '-' || Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG SEPARATOR ', ') AS PLEDGE_FGS FROM TB_PLEDGE Z1 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z2 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z3 , TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z4 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z3.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z2.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = Z1.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ORDER BY Z4.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z3.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, Z2.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ ) , '') AS COL78 , NVL((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_REPORT Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ), 0) + NVL((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_SHEET Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ), 0) AS E00 , NVL((SELECT SUM(DECODE(Z1.VERI_CL_CD, 'RP002', DECODE(Z2.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1), DECODE(Z3.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1))) FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z1 , (SELECT ZZ2.FIS_YEAR , ZZ2.BGT_DGR , ZZ2.REPORT_DETL_CD FROM TB_REPORT ZZ2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ2.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ2.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z2 , (SELECT ZZ3.FIS_YEAR , ZZ3.BGT_DGR , ZZ3.SHEET_DETL_CD FROM TB_SHEET ZZ3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ3.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ3.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ3.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z2.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z2.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z2.REPORT_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z3.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z3.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z3.SHEET_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND Z1.VERI_FG = '010' ), 1) AS E10 , NVL((SELECT SUM(DECODE(Z1.VERI_CL_CD, 'RP002', DECODE(Z2.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1), DECODE(Z3.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1))) FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z1 , (SELECT ZZ2.FIS_YEAR , ZZ2.BGT_DGR , ZZ2.REPORT_DETL_CD FROM TB_REPORT ZZ2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ2.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ2.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z2 , (SELECT ZZ3.FIS_YEAR , ZZ3.BGT_DGR , ZZ3.SHEET_DETL_CD FROM TB_SHEET ZZ3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ3.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ3.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ3.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z2.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z2.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z2.REPORT_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z3.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z3.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z3.SHEET_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND Z1.VERI_FG = '020' ), 1) AS E11 , NVL((SELECT SUM(DECODE(Z1.VERI_CL_CD, 'RP002', DECODE(Z2.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1), DECODE(Z3.FIS_YEAR, NULL, 0, 1))) FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z1 , (SELECT ZZ2.FIS_YEAR , ZZ2.BGT_DGR , ZZ2.REPORT_DETL_CD FROM TB_REPORT ZZ2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ2.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ2.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z2 , (SELECT ZZ3.FIS_YEAR , ZZ3.BGT_DGR , ZZ3.SHEET_DETL_CD FROM TB_SHEET ZZ3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ3.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ3.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ3.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z3 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z2.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z2.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z2.REPORT_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z3.FIS_YEAR(+) AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z3.BGT_DGR(+) AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z3.SHEET_DETL_CD(+) AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND Z1.VERI_FG = '030' ), 1) AS E12 , NVL((SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, Z1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 0)) FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z1 , TB_REPORT Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z2.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z2.BGT_DGR AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z2.REPORT_DETL_CD AND Z1.VERI_FG = '040' AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ), 1) AS RE13 , NVL((SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, Z1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 0)) FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOKVERI Z1 , TB_SHEET Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = Z2.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = Z2.BGT_DGR AND Z1.VERI_DETL_CD = Z2.SHEET_DETL_CD AND Z1.VERI_FG = '040' AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ), 1) AS SE13 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_REPORT Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.REPORT_CD = '030' AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = '031' ), 'N') AS R031 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_REPORT Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.REPORT_CD = '030' AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = '032' ), 'N') AS R032 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_REPORT Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.REPORT_CD = '030' AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = '033' ), 'N') AS R033 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_REPORT Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.REPORT_CD = '030' AND Z1.REPORT_DETL_CD = '034' ), 'N') AS R034 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_SHEET Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.SHEET_CD = 'TA0' AND Z1.SHEET_DETL_CD = 'TA3' ), 'N') AS STA3 , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_SHEET Z1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z1.SHEET_CD = 'TA0' AND Z1.SHEET_DETL_CD = 'TA5' ), 'N') AS STA5 , V110 AS V110 , V120 AS V120 , V130 AS V130 , V140 AS V140 , V150 AS V150 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_REPORT020 D , TB_DGRBIZ E , TB_YEARFISFG F , ( SELECT A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL10 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL11 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL12 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL13 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL14 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL15 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL16 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '210', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL17 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL19 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL20 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL21 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL22 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL23 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL24 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL25 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '210', NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL26 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL30 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL31 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL32 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL33 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL34 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL35 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL36 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '210', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL37 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL38 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL42 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL43 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL44 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL45 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL46 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL47 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL48 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '210', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL49 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL50 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL66 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), '120', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), '130', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL67 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), '150', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL68 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL69 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL70 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), '200', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), '210', NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0)) AS COL71 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', DECODE(NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', DECODE(NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) AS V110 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', DECODE(NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '120', DECODE(NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) AS V120 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', DECODE(NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '130', DECODE(NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) AS V130 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', DECODE(NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', DECODE(NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) AS V140 , SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', DECODE(NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', DECODE(NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) + SUM(DECODE(C.STAND_FRSC_CD, '150', DECODE(NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0), 0, 0, 1), 0)) AS V150 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC B , TB_YEARFRSC C , TB_DGRDEPT D WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.FIS_YEAR = B.FIS_YEAR AND C.FRSC_FG_CD = B.FRSC_FG_CD AND D.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND D.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND D.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND D.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND D.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND D.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = D.FIS_YEAR(+) AND A.BGT_DGR = D.BGT_DGR(+) AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = D.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID(+) AND F.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND F.FIS_FG_CD = E.FIS_FG_CD AND E.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND E.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND E.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = Z.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = Z.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_REPORT ZZ WHERE 1 = 1 AND ZZ.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND ZZ.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND ZZ.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND ZZ.REPORT_CD = #condReportCd#
AND ZZ.REPORT_DETL_CD = #condReportDetlCd#
)
) T ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.FIS_FG_CD, '000') , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.DEPT_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.DEPT_CD, '0000000') , NVL(T.PBIZ_RANK, '0') , NVL(T.PBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.UBIZ_RANK, '0') , NVL(T.UBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.DBIZ_RANK, '0') , NVL(T.DBIZ_CD, '0000000000000000') , NVL(T.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, '00000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)
